a.def: Used before a noun to refer to one thing (not specific)

above.def: In a higher position than something
ex: The plane flew above the clouds.
The painting hangs above the door.

across.def: From one side to the other side of something
ex: The bridge goes across the river.

act.def: To do something; to perform in a play or film
ex: He decided to act on the advice.

action.def: The process of doing something to achieve a goal
ex: We need to take action now.
The movie is full of action.

activity.def: Something that you do for enjoyment or a purpose
ex: There are many activities for children here.

add.def: To put something together with something else
ex: Please add sugar to my coffee.
I want to add one more thing.

afraid.def: Feeling fear; worried that something bad may happen
ex: Do not be afraid to ask questions.
I will call you after work.

afternoon.def: The time between noon and evening
ex: I will see you this afternoon.
She always sleeps in the afternoon.
I want to go there again.

age.def: The number of years someone has lived
ex: Children of all ages can play.
I moved here two years ago.
A long time ago, there was a king.

agree.def: To have the same opinion as someone
ex: They could not agree on a plan.

air.def: The invisible gas that we breathe
ex: Open the window for fresh air.
The air smells clean after rain.

airport.def: A place where planes take off and land
ex: We arrived at the airport early.
The airport is very busy today.

all.def: Every one of; the whole amount

ex: She is also a good singer.
I always drink water in the morning.
The view from here is amazing.

angry.def: Feeling strong displeasure about something unfair
ex: He was angry about the decision.
Do not be angry with me.

animal.def: A living creature that is not a plant or human
ex: A dog is a popular animal.
Wild animals live in the forest.
Would you like another cup of tea?

answer.def: Something you say or write in reply to a question
ex: What is the answer to this question?
She did not answer my call.
I do not have any money.

anyone.def: Any person; it does not matter who
ex: I did not see anyone there.

anything.def: Any thing; it does not matter what
ex: Is there anything I can do?

apartment.def: A set of rooms for living in, inside a building
ex: They live in a small apartment.
I am looking for a new apartment.

apple.def: A round fruit that is red, green, or yellow
ex: I eat an apple every day.
She bought some apples from the market.

area.def: A part of a place, city, or country
ex: There is a park in this area.

arm.def: The body part between your shoulder and your hand
ex: She broke her arm last week.
He put his arm around her.

around.def: On all sides of; in the area near
ex: There are trees around the house.
Is there a bank around here?

arrive.def: To reach a place, especially at the end of a journey

art.def: Paintings, drawings, music, or other creative works

artist.def: A person who creates art, such as paintings or music

ask.def: To say something to get an answer or information
ex: Can I ask you a question?

at.def: Used to show a place, time, or direction

away.def: To or at a distance from here

baby.def: A very young child who cannot yet walk or talk
ex: She had a baby last month.

back.def: The part of your body behind you; returning

bad.def: Not good; of low quality or harmful

bag.def: A container made of paper, plastic, or leather
ex: She put the books in her bag.

ball.def: A round object used in games and sports
ex: The children played with a ball.

bank.def: A place where you keep your money safely
ex: I need to go to the bank.

bath.def: Washing your whole body in water
ex: I take a bath every evening.

be.def: To exist; to have a quality or state
ex: I want to be a doctor.
To be or not to be.

beach.def: An area of sand next to the sea
ex: We went to the beach yesterday.
Let us build a sandcastle on the beach.

beautiful.def: Very pleasing to look at or hear
ex: The garden is beautiful in spring.
I stayed home because I was sick.
She is happy because she passed the exam.

become.def: To start to be something; to grow into
ex: He wants to become a pilot.
It became very cold at night.

bed.def: A piece of furniture for sleeping on
ex: I go to bed at 10 pm.

before.def: Earlier in time; in front of
ex: I have seen this movie before.
The movie will begin at 8 pm.
The garden is behind the house.

believe.def: To think that something is true or real
ex: She does not believe in ghosts.

best.def: Of the highest quality; better than all others
ex: This is the best pizza I have ever eaten.

better.def: Of a higher quality than something else
ex: This one is better than that one.
She is a better cook than me.

between.def: In the space separating two things
ex: The park is between the school and the hospital.

big.def: Large in size, amount, or importance
ex: They live in a big house.

bird.def: An animal with wings and feathers that can usually fly
ex: A bird is singing in the tree.
I saw a beautiful bird today.

black.def: The darkest color, like the night sky

blue.def: The color of the sky on a clear day

body.def: The physical form of a person or animal
ex: Exercise is good for your body.

book.def: A set of pages with writing or pictures, inside a cover
ex: I am reading a good book.
She wrote a book about cooking.

born.def: Coming into life; starting to exist

ex: She speaks both English and French.

boy.def: A male child or young man
ex: The boy is playing in the park.

bread.def: A common food made from flour and water, baked in an oven
ex: I bought some bread from the bakery.

break.def: To damage something so it separates into pieces; a rest
ex: Be careful not to break the glass.
Let us take a short break.

breakfast.def: The first meal of the day, eaten in the morning
ex: What did you have for breakfast?
I always eat breakfast at 8 am.

bring.def: To carry something or someone to a place
ex: Please bring your book to class.

brother.def: A male who has the same parents as you
ex: My brother is older than me.
He and his brother look alike.

brown.def: The color of wood, earth, or chocolate

build.def: To make something by putting parts together
ex: They want to build a new house.
He built a table from wood.

bus.def: A large vehicle that carries many passengers
ex: I take the bus to work.

business.def: The activity of buying and selling; a company

busy.def: Having a lot of things to do; not free
ex: She is too busy to come.

but.def: Used to introduce something different or opposite
ex: I want to go, but I am tired.

buy.def: To get something by paying money for it
ex: I want to buy a new phone.

by.def: Near; through the action of; before a time
ex: This book was written by her.

call.def: To use a phone to speak to someone; to give a name

can.def: To be able to do something; to have permission

car.def: A vehicle with four wheels and an engine
ex: I go to work by car.

card.def: A small piece of stiff paper for writing or playing games
ex: She sent me a birthday card.

carry.def: To hold something and move it to another place
ex: Can you carry this bag for me?

cat.def: A small animal with fur that people keep as a pet
ex: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.

change.def: To become different; to make something different
ex: I need to change my clothes.

cheap.def: Not costing a lot of money
ex: It looks cheap but it is good quality.

child.def: A young person who is not yet an adult

city.def: A large town where many people live and work
ex: I live in the city center.
The city is beautiful at night.

class.def: A group of students who learn together; a lesson
ex: She is the best in her class.

clean.def: Free from dirt; to remove dirt from something

ex: The shop is close to my house.

clothes.def: Things that you wear on your body
ex: I need to wash my clothes.

cold.def: Having a low temperature; not warm

come.def: To move toward or arrive at a place
ex: Can you come to my party?

computer.def: An electronic machine that stores and processes information
ex: I work on a computer all day.

cook.def: To prepare food by heating it

ex: She thinks she is very cool.

country.def: A nation with its own government; rural area
ex: I prefer the country to the city.

course.def: A series of lessons; naturally, of course
ex: I am taking an English course.

cut.def: To use a knife or scissors to divide something

ex: My dad works in a hospital.

dance.def: To move your body to music

daughter.def: A female child of a parent

day.def: A period of 24 hours; the time when it is light
ex: I work five days a week.

decide.def: To choose something after thinking about it
ex: I cannot decide what to eat.

difficult.def: Not easy; hard to do or understand
ex: Learning a new language is difficult.

dinner.def: The main meal of the day, usually in the evening
ex: We had dinner at a restaurant.

do.def: To perform an action; to complete a task
ex: I do my homework after school.

doctor.def: A person whose job is to treat sick people
ex: I need to see a doctor.
She is a doctor at the hospital.
The doctor said I am fine.

dog.def: A common animal that people keep as a pet
ex: She walks her dog every morning.

door.def: A flat piece of wood or glass that you open to enter

down.def: Toward a lower place; from high to low

draw.def: To make a picture using a pen or pencil

drink.def: To take liquid into your mouth and swallow it
ex: Would you like something to drink?

drive.def: To control and move a car or vehicle

during.def: Through the whole time of something
ex: She fell asleep during the movie.
